summary: Highly praised mastering makes this recording shine, though no performance details are available.
review: The reviewer lauds the cut and polish of the tape, calling it a “GD gem” with excellent sound quality. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist were provided, leaving the show aspect unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review mentions the recording’s polish; no information on the performance leads to a modest overall rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the set, cut and polishing as “nicely … polished,” indicating clear, well‑mastered audio.
